# Plan: Split CohortInfo into TargetCohort and PopulationCohort

## Summary
Replace the single `CohortInfo` R6 class with two purpose-specific classes: `TargetCohort` (for prevalent and incidence study cohorts, with an explicit `calculationMode` parameter) and `PopulationCohort` (simple denominator cohort, no JSON). Remove `CohortInfo` entirely. Rename `createPrevalenceCohort` → `createTargetCohort`. This allows non-circe derived cohorts to work in era mode without JSON validation failing.

---

## Phase 1: Create New R6 Classes — `R/R6Class.R`

**Step 1 — Create `TargetCohort` R6 class** (replaces `CohortInfo` for prevalent and incidence target use)
- Private fields: `.id`, `.name`, `.calculationMode`, `.circePatternLabel`
- `initialize(id, name, calculationMode = "era", circeJsonPath = NULL)`:
  - `checkmate::assert_choice(calculationMode, choices = c("era", "occurrence"))`
  - If `calculationMode == "occurrence"`: require `circeJsonPath`, assert file exists, call `validateCirceJson()` (existing logic)
  - If `calculationMode == "era"`: skip JSON entirely, set `.circePatternLabel = "ERA (Interval Overlap)"`
- Move `validateCirceJson()` method verbatim from `CohortInfo` — only invoked when occurrence mode
- Active bindings / public methods: `id()`, `name()`, `getCircePattern()` (returns `.calculationMode`), `viewCohortInfo()`
- `@export`

**Step 2 — Create `PopulationCohort` R6 class** (replaces `CohortInfo(cohortType="population")`)
- Private fields: `.id`, `.name`
- `initialize(id, name)`: assert integerish id, assert string name — no JSON, no mode
- Methods: `id()`, `name()`, `viewCohortInfo()` (no `getCircePattern()` needed)
- `@export`

**Step 3 — Remove `CohortInfo` class definition** — no alias, no backward compat

---

## Phase 2: Update Analysis Classes — `R/R6Class.R`

**Step 4 — Update `CohortPrevalenceAnalysis$initialize`** (*depends on Steps 1–3*)
- `checkmate::assert_class(prevalentCohort, classes = "TargetCohort")`
- `checkmate::assert_class(populationCohort, classes = "PopulationCohort", null.ok = TRUE)`
- Update any method that reads `cohortType` or `.circePatternLabel` strings from the old class

**Step 5 — Update `IncidenceAnalysis$initialize`** (*depends on Steps 1–3*)
- `checkmate::assert_class(targetCohort, classes = "TargetCohort")`

---

## Phase 3: Update Wrappers — `R/R6ClassWrappers.R`

**Step 6 — Rename and update `createPrevalenceCohort` → `createTargetCohort`** (*depends on Phase 1*)
- New signature: `createTargetCohort(cohortId, cohortName, calculationMode = "era", circeJsonPath = NULL)`
- Body: `TargetCohort$new(id = cohortId, name = cohortName, calculationMode = calculationMode, circeJsonPath = circeJsonPath)`

**Step 7 — Update `createPopulationCohort`** (*depends on Phase 1*)
- Same signature, body: `PopulationCohort$new(id = cohortId, name = cohortName)`

---

## Phase 4: Update Documentation

**Step 8 — Regenerate/update roxygen2 docs** (*parallel with Phase 3*)
- New Rd files for `TargetCohort` and `PopulationCohort` (auto-generated by devtools::document)
- Remove `man/CohortInfo.Rd` if it exists
- Remove `man/createPrevalenceCohort.Rd`, replaced by `man/createTargetCohort.Rd`
- Check `NAMESPACE` for old `CohortInfo` exports to remove

**Step 9 — Update `NEWS.md`**
- Breaking changes: `CohortInfo` removed; `createPrevalenceCohort` renamed to `createTargetCohort`; new `calculationMode` parameter

---

## Phase 5: Update Tests — `tests/testthat/test-R6ClassWrappers.R`

**Step 10 — Update/fix test file** (*depends on Phases 1–3*)
- Update `createPrevalenceCohort` → `createTargetCohort` calls
- Test `createTargetCohort(1, "Name")` → `TargetCohort`, `calculationMode = "era"`
- Test `createTargetCohort(1, "Name", calculationMode = "occurrence", circeJsonPath = ...)` validates JSON
- Test `createPopulationCohort(1, "Pop")` → `PopulationCohort`
- Remove/skip outdated tests referencing `createTargetCohort` (old incidence wrapper), `createLookBackOptions`

---

## Relevant Files
- `R/R6Class.R` — `CohortInfo` (remove), `TargetCohort` + `PopulationCohort` (add), `CohortPrevalenceAnalysis`, `IncidenceAnalysis` (class checks)
- `R/R6ClassWrappers.R` — `createPrevalenceCohort` (rename/rewrite), `createPopulationCohort` (update)
- `NAMESPACE` — generated by devtools::document; old `CohortInfo` export removed
- `man/createPrevalenceCohort.Rd` — remove (replaced by `createTargetCohort.Rd`)
- `tests/testthat/test-R6ClassWrappers.R` — update tests

---

## Verification
1. `devtools::document()` completes without warning or error
2. `devtools::check()` passes (no ERRORs)
3. `createTargetCohort(1, "DerivedCohort")` — no JSON, defaults to era, no error
4. `createTargetCohort(1, "CirceCohort", calculationMode = "occurrence", circeJsonPath = "path/x.json")` validates and uses occurrence SQL
5. `createPopulationCohort(1, "Pop")` creates `PopulationCohort` object
6. End-to-end `createCohortPrevalenceAnalysis(prevalentCohort = createTargetCohort(...), populationCohort = createPopulationCohort(...), ...)` works
7. End-to-end `createRassenIncidenceAnalysis(targetCohort = createTargetCohort(...), ...)` works

---

## Decisions
- `TargetCohort` is the class name, used for both prevalence and incidence study cohorts
- `CohortInfo` fully removed, no deprecated alias
- `calculationMode = c("era", "occurrence")` explicit parameter, JSON only required/used when `"occurrence"`
- Wrapper renamed: `createPrevalenceCohort` → `createTargetCohort`
- `CohortPrevalenceAnalysis` parameter still named `prevalentCohort` (role-specific) but accepts `TargetCohort` class
